      Saves a record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.

      Searches for records based on the provided DTO criteria with pagination.

      Searches for all records based on the provided DTO criteria without pagination.

      Searches for records based on the provided DTO criteria with pagination.

      Searches for all records based on the provided DTO criteria without pagination.

      Searches for records based on the provided DTO criteria with pagination.
      java.util.List BaseServiceInt.search​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for all records based on the provided DTO criteria without pagination.

      Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.

      Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.

      Finds a user by their login ID.

      Finds a marksheet by the student's name.

      Finds marksheet by name.

      Finds a role by its name.

      Finds a role by its name.

      Finds a marksheet by the student's roll number.

      Finds marksheet by Roll No
